sections.paragraph:
- Original: Βελίαλ

- Transliteration: Belial

- Phonetic: bel-ee'-al

- Definition: Belial = "worthless or wicked"

1. a name of Satan

- Origin: of hebrew origin H1100

- TDNT entry: 11:07,1

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin [H1100]; worthlessness; Belial as an epithet of Satan: - Belial.
